inputs.srepr: Add(Mul(Rational(1, 2), Pow(Symbol('kappa', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)), Pow(Symbol('omega_0', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2))), Mul(Rational(1, 2), Pow(Symbol('v', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2))))

output.srepr: Mul(Integer(-1), Symbol('Gamma', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Symbol('v', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))

method: compute d/dt[1/2 v^2 + 1/2 omega0^2 kappa^2] using kappa_dot=v, v_dot=-Gamma*v-omega0^2*kappa
